evals.name: ensure-servicemonitor
evals.prompt: Add a ServiceMonitor so the frontend service in apptique-dev gets scraped.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability preflight`, previews `cub-observability ensure-servicemonitor apptique-dev/frontend` (dry-run, shows the derived manifest), then commits with --commit --change-desc, creating a new ServiceMonitor Unit (not applied).

evals.name: inject-sidecar
evals.prompt: Inject an OpenTelemetry collector sidecar into the web deployment.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability inject-sidecar <space>/web --image otel/opentelemetry-collector:...` dry-run then --commit --change-desc. Uses set-path find-or-append; re-run replaces, not duplicates. No cluster apply.

evals.name: fleet-sidecar
evals.prompt: Add the otel collector to every prod workload.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability fleet-edit --profile otel-sidecar --environment prod --param image=...` dry-run (count) then --commit --change-desc.

evals.name: routes-read-elsewhere
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a read and routes to observability-findings / observability-audit rather than mutating.
